title: When the length of a SystemVerilog array parameter (A[B]) is another parameter(B), verilator always use default value of B

features.name: unpacked array parameter sized by another parameter
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array parameter where the array size is defined by another parameter (e.g., parameter int ARRAY_SIZE = 4; parameter logic [7:0] ARR[ARRAY_SIZE];)
features.snippet:
parameter int ARRAY_SIZE = 4;
parameter logic [7:0] ARR[ARRAY_SIZE];

features.name: parameter override at instantiation with smaller value
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation that overrides a parameter to a value smaller than its default, where that parameter determines array size

features.name: assignment pattern with fewer elements than unpacked array parameter size
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern that provides fewer elements than the declared unpacked array parameter size, triggering size mismatch
